title: belvala parviflora
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", belvala parviflora benefits, as mentioned in a study about Brickellia veronicifolia, include analgesic, antidiabetic, and spasmolytic effects.
side_effects: Belvala parviflora can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and vomiting, as well as allergic reactions, which can manifest as skin rashes and itching. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to kidney damage and liver inflammation. Additionally, using Belvala parviflora in conjunction with certain medications can result in adverse interactions, such as increased blood pressure and heart rate. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using Belvala parviflora or any other herbal remedy to minimize the risk of side effects.
